name: onsite-notes
description: Simple note-taking application with time tracking

scripts.build: npx tsc -p tsconfig.json && webpack --config webpack.config.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.copyFileSync('src/renderer/index.html','dist/renderer/index.html'); fs.copyFileSync('src/renderer/style.css','dist/renderer/style.css');"
scripts.//safemode: added safe mode scripts to help with GPU-related crashes on some machines
scripts.start:safe: npm run build && set ELECTRON_SAFE_MODE=1&& electron .
